textPlain: I’m curious, what got you interested in solving this particular problem? I.e. what was your specific use case?Most websites work fine with plain html. If you need something fancier, the world seems to have settled on using React.I get that this is to let you render html on the backend and then stream it to the site so that JS can update the dom. But why? Genuine question; I’m not saying there’s no good reason.
